link.description: Sbona is a modern and clean Joomla template designed specifically for sports clubs, fitness centers, gyms, and athletic organizations. With a clean, flat, and contemporary design combined with dynamic visuals, the theme delivers a professional and energetic look suitable for all sport-related websites. Sports is perfect for showcasing teams, events, training programs, classes, coaches, and sports facilities. Sbona template has fully responsive layout. It fits perfectly on various displays and resolutions from regular desktop screens to tablets, iPads, iPhones and small mobile devices.
